query: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT userId) as users_with_sets FROM training_sets WHERE userId IS NOT NULL; SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT userId) as users_with_cycles FROM cycle_history WHERE userId IS NOT NULL; SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ts.userId) as users_with_attempts FROM puzzle_attempts pa JOIN training_sets ts ON pa.trainingSetId = ts.id WHERE ts.userId IS NOT NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT userId) as users_with_sets FROM training_sets WHERE userId IS NOT NULL; SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT userId) as users_with_cycles FROM cycle_history WHERE userId IS NOT NULL; SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ts.userId) as users_with_attempts FROM puzzle_attempts pa JOIN training_sets ts ON pa.trainingSetId = ts.id WHERE ts.userId IS NOT NULL;
